info.name: Bankcore-Collection
info.description:
This Postman collection contains all the requests related to the **Customers** and **Accounts** microservices.

Its main purpose is to enable **controlled and structured manual testing**, allowing developers and testers to interact with the system, validate business flows, and verify the behavior of each endpoint in an isolated and predictable way.

The collection serves as a centralized tool to:

- Perform manual API testing
    
- Validate request and response contracts
    
- Simulate real usage scenarios
    
- Support development, debugging, and QA processes

item.name: bankcore-customers

request.description:
### 🧾 Register Customer

**Endpoint**  
`POST {{base_url_customers}}/api/auth/register`

**Description**

Registers a new customer in the system by creating a user account with validated credentials and security rules.

This endpoint is intended for **manual testing and controlled user registration** during development and QA processes.

---

### 📥 Request Body Rules

The request body must comply with the following validation rules:

#### 🔐 Credentials

- **email**
    
    - Must be unique in the system
        
- **dni**
    
    - Must be unique in the system
        

#### 🔑 Password Policy

- Length must be between **8 and 20 characters**
    
- Must contain:
    
    - At least **one lowercase letter**
        
    - At least **one uppercase letter**
        
    - At least **one number**
        
    - At least **one special character**
        

#### 🏧 ATM PIN Policy

- **atmPin**
    
    - Must be **numeric only**
        
    - Must be **exactly 4 digits**
        
    - Repeated digits are **not allowed**
        
        (e.g. `1111`, `2222` are invalid)
        

### 📤 Responses

#### ✅ **201 Created**

The customer was successfully registered.

- The user account has been created and persisted in the system.
    
- Unique constraints for **email** and **dni** were validated successfully.
    

---

#### ❌ **400 Bad Request**

The request body is invalid or does not comply with the required validation rules.

Possible reasons include:

- Password does not meet the required security policy
    
- ATM PIN is not numeric, does not contain exactly 4 digits, or contains repeated digits
    
- Missing or malformed required fields
    

---

#### ⚠️ **409 Conflict**

The registration could not be completed due to a conflict with existing data.

Possible reasons include:

- The **email** is already registered
    
- The **dni** is already registered

item.description:
This folder contains all the API requests related to the **Customers** microservice.

It is intended to support **manual testing and validation** of customer-related operations, allowing controlled interaction with the service endpoints and verification of their expected behavior.

The requests in this folder cover the main customer flows and can be used during development, debugging, and QA processes.

item.name: bankcore-accounts
item.description:
This folder contains all the API requests related to the **Accounts** microservice.

It is intended to support **manual testing and validation** of account-related operations, allowing controlled interaction with the service endpoints and verification of their expected behavior.

The requests in this folder cover the main account lifecycle and transactional flows and are used during development, debugging, and QA processes.
